prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约7181名，2023年约3964名，2024年约4013名，2025年物理类约3926名；2022年位次异常偏高，2023年起稳定在3900–4000区间，近3年波动 较小，2025年基准约3926名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年37人、2023年33人、2024年33人、2025年36人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划40人，较2 025年扩招约11.1%，名额增加有利于缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第66名，属全国财经类顶尖院校，在西 部地区影响力突出；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第92位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低，报考关注度未出现异常 升温信号；应用经济学获评A+（全国顶尖），工商管理获评A，统计学获评A-；财经类学科实力突出，对理科考生中偏好经管方向者仍有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业近年社会热度整体呈分化观望态势，但西财在物理类开设的统计学类、计算机类、金融科技等交叉专业契合当前工科热度，有一定吸引力；宁夏2026年高考 总人数约6.6万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争格局总体稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约3926名、2026年物理类招生计划扩招约11.1% （名额增加4人）以及考生总数基本持平，但考虑到财经类整体热度略有降温、学校声誉平稳。预测2026年物理类最低位次约4173名，区间3673–4673名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 7181, in 2023 about 3964, in 2024 about 4013, and in 2025 for physics category about 3926; the 2022 rank was abnormally high, stabilizing in the 3900–4000 range from 2023 onward, with small fluctuations in the past 3 years, and the 2025 baseline is about 3926; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science/physics category: 37 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 36 in 2025; for 2026 (enrollment plan document) plans 40, an expansion of about 11.1% compared to 2025, and the increase in slots helps ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked about 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top finance and economics institutions nationwide, with prominent influence in the western region; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, short video platform exposure is moderately low, and application attention shows no abnormal warming signal; Applied Economics is rated A+ (national top), Business Administration rated A, Statistics rated A-; the strength of finance and economics disciplines remains attractive to science candidates who prefer the economics and management direction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the social popularity of finance and economics majors has shown an overall trend of divergence and wait-and-see, but the interdisciplinary majors offered by SWUFE in the physics category, such as Statistics, Computer Science, and Financial Technology, align with current engineering popularity and have some appeal; the total number of Ningxia 2026 college entrance examination candidates is about 66,000, basically the same as 2025, and the competition landscape is generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline rank of about 3926, the 2026 physics category enrollment plan expansion of about 11.1% (increase of 4 slots), and the total number of candidates being basically flat, but considering the overall popularity of finance and economics has slightly cooled and the university's reputation is stable. It is predicted that the 2026 physics category lowest rank will be about 4173, with a range of 3673–4673.

Candidates with rank within the lower limit of the range (3673) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting CPA direction, Law dual degree, Top-notch experimental class); candidates with rank in the middle of the range (about 4173) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 with appropriate sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rank near the upper limit of the range (4673) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety, with Tier 2 as an attempt.
